pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page summarizing AI and business strategy consulting offerings and routing users to key actions.
primary_functions: Introduce the consulting firm’s focus areas (AI strategy, transformation, training, governance).
Highlight primary calls-to-action such as Book Consultation, View Packages, Take AI Readiness Assessment, Explore Training, and View Upcoming Webinars.
Surface featured case studies and recent blog posts with links to detailed content.
Provide quick entry points to Project Estimator and Resources (Blog and Events).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary hero CTA 'Book Consultation' or header link 'Book Consultation'
Click CTA 'View Packages' or header link 'Plans & Packages'
Click CTA 'Take AI Readiness Assessment'
Click CTA 'Explore Training' or header link 'Training'
Click CTA 'View Upcoming Webinars' or header link 'Events & Webinars'
Click resources teaser section or header link 'Resources'
Click featured case study section title or card 'View all case studies'
Click CTA 'Get a Project Estimate' or header link 'Project Estimator'
Click header link 'Saved Items'
Click header link 'About'
Click footer link 'Contact'

access_methods.description: Users can reach Home using browser back or direct navigation from other pages
Accessible by entering index.html or site root in the browser

pages.name: Book Consultation
pages.description: Dedicated booking form for scheduling AI strategy and related consultations.
primary_functions: Allow users to select service type (e.g., AI Strategy Consultation) and meeting duration (e.g., 60 minutes).
Collect industry (e.g., Manufacturing), date and time via pickers, team size/participants, and budget range.
Capture contact details (name, email) and consultation goals or notes.
Submit the consultation booking request and display confirmation or next steps.
Support pre-filling fields when navigated from recommended services or offering details.

incoming_params.description: Optional service type enum (e.g., 'ai_strategy_consultation') used to pre-select consultation type.
Optional meeting duration in minutes (e.g., 60) when coming from an offering with a suggested duration.
Optional industry key (e.g., 'manufacturing') to pre-fill industry.
Optional ISO 8601 datetime suggestion when the consultation is initiated from an event.
ID of a ConsultingOffering when booking from a specific service or package.
ID of the source entity (e.g., offeringId, assessmentSessionId, eventId) to request prefill data.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link or button 'Back to Home' after successful booking submission
Click link 'Explore Packages' from confirmation state

access_methods.description: Can be deep-linked with query parameters to prefill the form when coming from offerings, assessment, or events

pages.name: Plans & Packages
pages.description: Listing page for standardized AI strategy and transformation packages with filters.
primary_functions: Display available consulting packages with key info such as target company size, price, and included workshops.
Provide filters for client size (e.g., mid-size 50–500 employees) and budget (e.g., max $12,000).
Allow sorting or scanning of packages that match selected filters.
Link to offering_detail.html for full package details and deeper evaluation.

incoming_params.description: Optional preset filter for target company size segment (e.g., 'mid_size').
Optional preset maximum price filter in numeric value (e.g., 12000).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a package card or 'View Details' link
Click 'Request Proposal' directly from a listed package (if available)

access_methods.description: Can be deep-linked with preset filters via URL parameters

pages.name: Offering Detail
pages.description: Generic detail page for a specific consulting offering (service or package).
primary_functions: Present full description of the selected offering, including objectives, deliverables, and who it’s for.
Show structured details such as number of workshops, duration, typical timeline, and price or price range.
Indicate offering type (e.g., AI Transformation Package, AI Strategy Roadmap service).
Provide primary calls-to-action such as “Request Proposal” (linking to proposal_request.html) and/or “Book Consultation” (linking to book_consultation.html).
Support deep links from plans, AI Readiness Assessment results, and other promos.

incoming_params.description: Primary identifier of the ConsultingOffering to display.
SEO-friendly slug that can alternatively be used to resolve the offering.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary CTA 'Request Proposal'
Click primary CTA 'Book Consultation'

access_methods.description: Accessed via offeringId or slug query parameters from Plans, Assessment results, or promotional links

pages.name: Proposal Request
pages.description: Form page to request a detailed proposal for a chosen package or configured project estimate.
primary_functions: Display the selected package or project configuration name, pre-filled when navigated from plans.html or estimator.html.
Allow editing or confirming the package/plan field if needed.
Collect company size/number of employees, desired project start date or month, and contact details (name, email).
Capture project description or notes (e.g., transformation scope or division).
Submit the proposal request and show confirmation messaging.

incoming_params.description: ID of the selected ConsultingOffering for which the proposal is being requested.
ID of the ProjectEstimate configuration when coming from the Project Estimator.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link 'Return to Home' after successful proposal request submission

access_methods.description: Reached from offerings or estimator using offeringId and/or estimateId query params

pages.name: Case Studies
pages.description: Library of client case studies focused on AI and business outcomes.
primary_functions: List case studies with key metadata such as industry, year, ROI, and project duration.
Provide filters for industry (e.g., Retail & E-commerce), date/year (e.g., 2022–2026), and impact/ROI thresholds (e.g., ROI ≥ 20%).
Allow users to open detailed case study views via links to content_detail.html.
Indicate which case studies are already saved to the reading list where applicable.
Support navigation to Saved Items (Reading List) for reviewing saved case studies.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a case study card or 'View details' link
Click link 'View Reading List' or header link 'Saved Items'

access_methods.description: Can be deep-linked with preset filters for campaigns or internal links

pages.name: Content Detail
pages.description: Unified detail page for a single case study or blog article, depending on context.
primary_functions: Render full content for a single item identified by parameters (e.g., contentType=case_study or contentType=blog_post and articleId).
For case studies: show industry, client size, project duration, ROI, timeline, and narrative results.
For blog posts: show publish date, topic tags (e.g., Governance & Ethics), and estimated read time.
Provide a prominent action to “Add to Reading List” for case studies or “Add to Reading Queue” for blog posts.
Allow navigation back to the originating list (Case Studies or Blog) and to Saved Items.

incoming_params.description: ID of the CaseStudy or BlogPost to display.
Optional SEO slug that can also be used to fetch the content.
Helps determine whether the 'Back' link should return to Case Studies or Blog.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Saved Items' after adding to Reading List or Reading Queue
Click 'Back to Case Studies' when viewing a case study
Click 'Back to Blog' when viewing a blog post

access_methods.description: Accessed with query parameters contentType and contentId (or slug) from lists or Saved Items

pages.name: Saved Items
pages.description: Central page for viewing and managing all saved content (reading list and reading queue).
primary_functions: Display a “Reading List” section listing saved case studies added from content_detail.html or case_studies.html.
Display a “Reading Queue” or “Saved Articles” section listing saved blog posts.
Allow users to open each saved item back in content_detail.html.
Provide options to remove items from the Reading List or Reading Queue.
Serve as the destination after users add required case studies or blog posts to complete tasks.

incoming_params.description: Optional focus for the page: 'reading_list' or 'reading_queue' to open the respective tab by default.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved item row or title

access_methods.description: Can be deep-linked with listType param to show Reading List or Reading Queue directly

pages.name: AI Readiness Assessment
pages.description: Interactive questionnaire to evaluate an organization’s AI readiness and recommend services.
primary_functions: Present questions on company size, data infrastructure maturity, AI experience, budget, leadership support, and technical skills.
Allow selection of predefined answer options, including mid-range options for moderate readiness.
On submission, calculate and display readiness results and a primary recommended service (e.g., AI Strategy Roadmap).
Show recommended service cards with context, and provide CTAs such as “Book Now” or “Learn More” linking to offering_detail.html.
From the recommended service detail, support onward navigation to book_consultation.html to complete booking.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click CTA 'Learn More' or 'Book Now' on the primary recommended service card
Click secondary CTA 'Book Consultation Now' directly from results (if provided)

access_methods.description: Accessible via header link 'AI Readiness Assessment'
Accessible via footer link 'AI Readiness Assessment'

pages.name: Events & Webinars
pages.description: Listing of upcoming events and webinars, including GenAI and marketing-focused sessions.
primary_functions: Display a list of events with date, time, topic/category, and delivery format.
Provide filters for date range (e.g., Next Month), topic/category (e.g., Marketing, GenAI for Marketing), and optionally time-of-day (e.g., between 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM).
Allow users to open individual event detail pages via links to event_detail.html.
Highlight webinars relevant to AI marketing and other key personas.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an event title or 'View Details' link

access_methods.description: Can be deep-linked with preset date and topic filters via URL

pages.name: Event Detail & Registration
pages.description: Detail page for a single event or webinar, including registration form.
primary_functions: Show event specifics such as title, focus (e.g., GenAI for Marketing), date, time, time zone, and target audience.
Provide a primary “Register” or “Sign Up” button that reveals or scrolls to the embedded registration form.
Collect attendee information: name, email, role/job title, company, and marketing opt-in (receive updates).
Submit the registration and display confirmation instructions (e.g., calendar invite, joining link).

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the Event to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all events' link
Click CTA 'Talk to an AI strategist' after registration confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessed using eventId query parameter from Events listing or promotional links

pages.name: Project Estimator
pages.description: Interactive estimator to configure an AI project and generate a rough estimate.
primary_functions: Allow users to select industry (e.g., Financial Services) from a dropdown.
Enable configuration of engagement scope (e.g., Strategy & Roadmap, Implementation) and modules (e.g., Data Audit, Team Training; explicitly leaving MLOps Setup unselected).
Provide controls for team size, timeline (e.g., 8 people, 16 weeks), and budget range (e.g., between $100,000 and $250,000).
Generate and display an estimated investment range and summary when the user clicks “Calculate Estimate” or “Generate Plan”.
Offer a “Request Detailed Proposal” or “Talk to Sales” CTA leading to proposal_request.html with the configuration info pre-populated.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click CTA 'Request Detailed Proposal' after an estimate has been generated

pages.name: Blog / Insights
pages.description: Insights hub for articles on AI, governance, strategy, and related topics.
primary_functions: Provide a search bar to query posts by keyword (e.g., “AI governance”).
Offer filters for date range (e.g., last 12 months) and topic/tag (e.g., Governance & Ethics).
Allow sorting of results by criteria such as Newest or Most Recent.
Display posts with title, short description, publish date, topic tags, and estimated read time.
Enable users to add posts (with read time under 10 minutes) directly to the Reading Queue or open them in content_detail.html.
Provide a link or icon to navigate to saved_items.html for viewing the Reading Queue.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a blog post title or 'Read more' link
Click 'Reading Queue' or 'Saved Articles' icon/link

access_methods.description: Can be deep-linked with preset search filters via URL

pages.name: Training Programs
pages.description: Catalog of AI training programs and workshops for different formats and regions.
primary_functions: List available training programs with key info such as price, delivery format (remote/in-person), region, capacity, and number of live sessions (where applicable).
Provide filters for delivery format (e.g., Remote/Virtual), region (e.g., Europe/EMEA), participant capacity (e.g., at least 30 participants), and budget (e.g., max $8,000).
Allow users to compare prices to identify the most affordable program that meets criteria.
Link to detailed program information via training_detail.html for selected offerings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a training program card or 'View Details' link

access_methods.description: Can be deep-linked with filters to highlight specific training formats or regions

pages.name: Training Detail & Booking
pages.description: Detail and booking page for a specific training program.
primary_functions: Show comprehensive details of the training program, including agenda, learning objectives, delivery format, region, participant capacity, and number of live sessions.
Display pricing and any options for custom cohorts or dates.
Provide a primary “Book Training” or “Request This Program” button that opens or scrolls to a booking form.
Collect booking details such as contact name, email, team size/number of participants, desired start date (e.g., in October 2026), and training objectives or notes.
Submit the training booking request and display confirmation messaging.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the TrainingProgram to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Training Catalog' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via trainingProgramId query parameter from Training catalog or direct promotions

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background on the consulting firm, its expertise, and approach to AI strategy.
primary_functions: Explain the firm’s mission, values, and specialization in AI and business strategy.
Describe the team’s experience, industries served, and typical client profiles.
Highlight certifications, partnerships, and notable achievements or media mentions.
Provide links to key pages such as Book Consultation, Case Studies, and Contact.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click CTA 'Book a Consultation' on About page
Click CTA 'View Client Case Studies'
Click CTA 'Contact Us'

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page for inquiries not covered by specific forms.
primary_functions: Provide a simple contact form to submit general questions or requests.
Collect contact details (name, email, company) and a free-text message.
Offer alternative contact information such as email addresses or office locations.
Link users to specialized forms where appropriate (e.g., Book Consultation, Project Estimator, Proposal Request).

incoming_params.description: Optional pre-selected topic for the contact form, such as 'sales', 'media', or 'partnerships'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link 'Book a Consultation' if user needs a structured booking
Click link 'Get a Project Estimate'
Click link 'Request a Proposal'

access_methods.description: Can be visited directly via contact.html URL

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information on how user data, form submissions, and analytics are handled.
primary_functions: Explain what data is collected via forms (consultation booking, proposals, registrations, etc.).
Describe how user data is stored, used, and protected.
Outline cookie and tracking practices, if applicable.
Provide contact details for privacy-related questions or requests.

access_methods.description: Can be visited directly via privacy.html URL

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and main entry points
Standard AI strategy and transformation packages
Schedule an AI strategy or advisory session
Client success stories and ROI examples
Blog and insights hub for AI strategy and governance
Upcoming events and webinars including GenAI topics
Configure a project and get an AI engagement estimate
Evaluate your organization’s AI readiness and get recommendations
Reading List and Reading Queue for saved case studies and articles
Learn about the firm and its expertise

footer_links.description: Schedule a consultation with an expert
Browse AI case studies by industry and impact
Read articles on AI strategy, governance, and transformation
See upcoming AI events and webinars
Get an estimated scope and budget for your AI project
Access your reading list and reading queue
Learn how your data is collected and used
